items.name: sankey-flow
items.description: A self-contained <sankey-flow> custom element powered by Mermaid Sankey layouts and rich overlay labels.

items.name: NFTMarket-GH
items.description: A vibrant NFT minting and trading platform tailored for Ghanaian artists, powered by blockchain! 🇬🇭

items.name: codex-reset-credits-skill
items.description: Codex Skill and runbook for querying banked Codex reset credits.

items.name: JAR
items.description: Janitor Ai Ripper - a local toolkit for scraping content hosted on JAI

items.name: DriverScope
items.description: Automated BYOVD driver analysis: import scanning, IOCTL dispatch extraction, Speakeasy emulation

items.name: telegram-echo-bot
items.description: Simple Telegram Echo Bot built with python-telegram-bot

items.name: adversarial-review
items.description: Stress-test your work against a panel of several leading AI models that independently try to break it — falsification, not advice. Precision-gated, multi-model adversarial review.

items.name: Responsive-Shopping-Cart-Website
items.description: A Responsive Shopping Cart Web Application built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. This project provides a simple and user-friendly online shopping experience with a fully responsive design that works on desktops, tablets, and mobile devices.

items.name: hands-on-rag-agent
items.description: 从零开始，一步步手搓一个 RAG + Agent 系统，理解每一块为什么存在，再做工程化。  使用 Gemini API（免费层，无需信用卡）+ LangChain + LangGraph + ChromaDB，全程不靠 OpenAI。

items.name: Moments-Countdown
items.description: uTools 插件：朝夕-倒数日（Moments Countdown）。支持多任务并行倒计时，覆盖日常、活动、备考等场景(如高考、考研、工作节点)，帮你精准把握每个重要时刻。

items.name: agent-discovery-protocol
items.description: A vendor-neutral discovery layer for machine-consumable service interfaces on the web.

items.name: box
items.description: Box — self-hosted Claude Code in your pocket. Run real Claude Code & Codex sessions on your own server, driven from your phone (native chat UI, voice, files, skills, always-on).
